title: cryptantha intermedia var. dumetorum
intro: Cryptantha intermedia var. dumetorum is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe and calm digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Cryptantha intermedia var. dumetorum can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots to make a tincture.
